summary: Vertical phone footage filmed at night along an airport curbside. A long line of travelers with rolling suitcases stands on the sidewalk under the terminal canopy, while cars with red brake lights queue in the roadway alongside. A reposter watermark appears in red. The audio is the person filming remarking on the length of the line. The tweet text says the Atlanta airport had a long line.

script.scene: Nighttime airport curbside with a long line of travelers and luggage on the sidewalk and queued cars in the roadway; red watermark.
